title: Why Fusion Energy Is So Hard
script_summary: Exploring the challenges of harnessing fusion energy on Earth.

segments.voiceover: Fusion powers the Sun—so why can’t we capture it here?
The secret? It’s all about creating the right conditions: extreme temperature and pressure.
Fusion needs over 150 million degrees Celsius—hotter than the core of the Sun! Can you imagine that?
Recent experiments have achieved net energy gain—big milestones—but commercial fusion is still years away.
The DOE and ITER work tirelessly to conquer these challenges. Imagine a world powered by clean fusion energy!
Curious about the future of energy? Hit like and follow for more science insights!
